WO-SPEC-HANG-FIX-REGISTRY-LOCK.title: SPEC: Phase B - AccountRegistry Thread Safety
WO-SPEC-HANG-FIX-REGISTRY-LOCK.instruction_raw: Write a MISSION_SPEC for Jules. Goal: Add `threading.RLock` to `AccountRegistry` in `account_registry.py`. Wrap `register_account` and `deregister_account` with the lock. Ensure the lock does NOT wrap logging calls (to prevent logging RLock deadlock). Include exact code diffs and test updates.

WO-SPEC-HANG-FIX-ADAPTER-OPT.title: SPEC: Phase D+E - Adapter Protocol & Logging Guard
WO-SPEC-HANG-FIX-ADAPTER-OPT.instruction_raw: Write a MISSION_SPEC for Jules. Two goals: (1) In `adapter.py`, cache the result of `isinstance(agent, IFinancialAgent)` checks or use an explicit type marker to avoid repeated `@runtime_checkable` protocol resolution in 10k loops. (2) Change `logger.info` calls inside `FinancialEntityAdapter.withdraw` to `logger.debug` to prevent Python logging RLock contention with AI background threads during initialization. Include exact code diffs.
